llm_recommendations.reason_for_recommendation: JM Financial maintained 'Buy' rating due to sustained strength in gas distribution, elevated profitability, sizeable investment pipeline, and strong Q4FY26 PAT (56% YoY), Revenue (52% YoY), EBITDA (54% YoY) growth.
Motilal Oswal Financial Services (MOFSL) reiterated 'Neutral' stance despite earnings beat and improving margins, citing caution on valuations and long-term demand dynamics.

Stock slipped 4%, hitting a 9-month low; mixed Q4FY26 performance with gold loan growth but QoQ decline in gold tonnage and active loan accounts; weakened asset quality due to RBI classification shift, leading to higher provisions and credit costs; increasing competitive intensity and risk of market share losses.
Top gainer, shares up 4.2% on news of potential doubling of fertiliser subsidy bill for FY27 and favorable southwest monsoon forecast boosting demand for the sector.
Shares gained over 3% due to positive sector outlook (subsidy, monsoon). Analyst noted it 'looks attractive' and offers 'a good short-term opportunity' with potential for further gains above ₹940.
